exercises.title: Threshold Analyzer
exercises.description: Compare logical error rates across code families.
tasks: Implement p_L formula for given threshold and distance
Compare surface vs color code at various physical rates
Find crossover point where one code beats another
Plot logical error rate vs distance for each code
Determine which code wins for given error rate
hints: Crossover depends on physical error rate

exercises.title: Resource Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate total resources for different codes.
tasks: Compute physical qubits per logical for each code
Calculate syndrome extraction time
Estimate Clifford gate times (transversal vs surgery)
Compare total resources for sample algorithms
Include magic state overhead

exercises.title: Code Selection Tool
exercises.description: Build a tool that recommends the optimal code.
tasks: Input: error rate, algorithm type, target fidelity
Evaluate surface code performance
Evaluate color code performance
Output recommendation with reasoning
Show performance metrics for chosen code
hints: Check if error rate is below threshold
Count Clifford vs T gates in algorithm
Calculate required distance for target fidelity

exercises.title: Algorithm Performance Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate algorithm execution on different codes.
tasks: Define sample algorithm (gate sequence)
Execute on surface code (count cycles, qubits)
Execute on color code (count cycles, qubits)
Estimate total error probability
Determine which code is better for this algorithm
hints: Consider both time and space overhead
